spec.name: zlib_compress_to_hex
spec.description: Compress a string with zlib and return the lowercase hex representation of the compressed bytes

data.description: The string content to compress with zlib

hex.description: Lowercase hex string of zlib-compressed bytes

spec.implementation_notes: Use Python: import zlib; compressed = zlib.compress(data.encode('utf-8')); return compressed.hex()

request.rationale: No available tool performs zlib compression. Objective requires compressing data.txt bytes with zlib and writing lowercase hex output. spawn_subagent also failed since it lacks file and code-execution tools.
